_comment: Tests node 1 routing for Sydney Spine: multi-location intercept for city/Double Bay references, booking routes to book_intent, info routes silently.

scenarios.name: City location inquiry triggers multi-location intercept
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says exactly 'I can only help with bookings for Pagewood. For the City or Double Bay clinic they can book online at sydney spine dot com dot au. Would you like to book at Pagewood instead?' and halts without a tool call. FAIL if agent routes to book_intent or info_pivot without the intercept.

scenarios.name: Booking intent routes to book_intent with polite ack

history.content: I'd like to make an appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks one polite ack ('Lovely!' / 'Wonderful!') then calls universal_router intent='book_intent'. FAIL if agent asks which location or omits the tool call.

scenarios.name: Info question routes silently to info_pivot
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output. FAIL if agent answers the parking question inline.

scenarios.name: Voicemail/IVR pickup — immediate machine termination

history.content: 420-691-603 isn't available right now. Please leave a detailed message after the tone. When you have finished recording, you may hang up or press 1 for more options.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says exactly 'Sounds like I've reached an automated system — I'll try again another time, bye.' AND calls end_call in the same response, with zero further re-greeting or 'are you there' checks. FAIL if agent asks if the caller is there, re-greets, or fails to call end_call.

scenarios.name: Repeated dead-air silence — second non-productive turn ends the call

history.content: Hi, You've reached Sydney Spine and Sports Clinic, you're speaking with AI Jane, please note, this number is for Pagewood only. How can I help you?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says exactly 'I'm not able to hear a clear response, so I'll let you go for now — feel free to call back anytime, bye.' AND calls end_call in the same response. FAIL if agent asks again if the caller is there, re-greets, loops, or fails to call end_call.

scenarios.name: Silence then real engagement — counter resets, no false-positive end_call

history.content: Hi, You've reached Sydney Spine and Sports Clinic, you're speaking with AI Jane, please note, this number is for Pagewood only. How can I help you?
Sorry, yes — I'd like to book an appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks one polite ack and calls universal_router intent='book_intent', with zero end_call. FAIL if agent calls end_call, or treats this turn as another non-productive turn.

scenarios.name: Rambling hesitant caller with embedded insurance question (real-call regression)

history.content: Hi, um, my name is Ben. Um, I wanna-- I introduced by one of your patients, uh, Henry, the Korean guy. Uh, yeah, I just wanna give it a try. I'm just wondering how, how you charge. Um, I've got a Bupa. I'm with a Bupa insurance. Um...

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output (system__message_to_speak empty). FAIL if agent produces any spoken filler (e.g. 'Mm-hmm'), asks a clarifying question instead of routing, or fails to call any tool.
